query: what are the $ amount for electronic visits
answer:
Electronic visits are covered when provided by a network provider using a secure web portal for non-emergent health issues.

| Benefit | Service | In-Network | Out-of-Network | Limitations |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| Electronic Visits (E-visits) | Electronic Visits (E-visits) | $25 copay per visit, deductible waived | Not covered | Data Not Found |

| Topic | Coverage Information |
| :--- | :--- |
| Electronic Visits (E-Visits) | An electronic provider visit (E-visit) is a structured online consultation with your provider using a secure web portal for non-emergent health issues. This benefit allows you to take advantage of the conveniences of online communication, similar to e-mail, when receiving health care services from a network provider who has agreed to provide this service. 29 Not all network providers offer E-visit services. Medical doctors (MD), Doctors of Osteopathy (DO), Nurse Practitioners (NP) and Physician Assistants (PA) are the only categories of providers approved for E-visit services. Please check with your network provider's office to see if your provider offers E-visit services. The Plan will provide benefits for medically necessary E-visits provided by a network provider for the treatment of a covered illness or injury. |
source: Premera Employees Health Plan – Standard PPO Retiree Plan
